_comment: Key illustrated events for Chapter 7 (verified: Shivaji builds his Maval band; specific meeting scenes framed representatively). 'anchor' is an EXACT substring of chapters/ch07.md. 'refs' are entity slugs from reference/index.json. 'image' filled by tools/refgen.py AFTER references are signed off.

events.title: Out in the Maval
events.anchor: on a tough hill pony, with the dust of the high tracks on him
events.scene_prompt: Teenage Shivaji (about fifteen) rides a tough little hill pony along a high ridge track through the folded Maval hills, a widening circle of lean, barefoot Maval hill-boys his own age loping and riding alongside him, easy and at home on the steep country. Dusty, free, spirited; sweeping green-brown valleys all around. A young leader and his growing band ranging the hills.

events.title: He ate what they ate
events.anchor: He ate what they ate, sitting on the ground in their villages.
events.scene_prompt: In a humble Maval village: teenage Shivaji sits cross-legged on the ground among ordinary hill people — including the powerfully built, grinning young Tanaji Malusare — sharing a simple meal of bhakri off leaf-plates, laughing and talking as an equal, not as a lord. Warm, intimate, full of easy brotherhood across rank. Village houses and hills behind.

events.title: The boys of the Mavals
events.anchor: Three of them, in time, would become names the whole country learned.
events.scene_prompt: A heroic group portrait of the young band in the Maval hills: teenage Shivaji at the centre, and with him his three key companions — the big, broad-shouldered, grinning Tanaji Malusare; the wiry, watchful swordsman Yesaji Kank; and the older, grey-moustached, dignified deshmukh Baji Pasalkar. Each a distinct face and build, all in Maval dress with talwars, standing together proud and loyal on a hilltop with the valleys spread below. Warm, rousing, brotherhood and shared purpose.

events.title: Whose hills are these, really?
events.anchor: Around the cooking fires at night, high in the hills
events.scene_prompt: Night, high in the hills: teenage Shivaji and his Maval companions — including big Tanaji Malusare and watchful Yesaji Kank and other hill youths — sit close around a small cooking fire, faces lit warm orange against the dark, deep in low, serious talk that is turning from old grievances toward a daring new idea. Intimate, conspiratorial, full of quiet fire and dawning purpose. Starry hill night.
